items.title: Jutarnja kava smanjuje rizik od teške bolesti i smrti?
items.summary: Pijenje kave, čak i bez kofeina, povezano je s manjim rizikom od ciroze, raka jetre i smrti uzrokovane bolestima jetre, pokazalo je novo istraživanje.

items.summary: ENGLESKA se u četvrtfinalu SP-a suočava s Meksikom na 2240 metara nadmorske visine.

items.summary: OMEGA-3 masne kiseline, uz vježbanje i zdravu prehranu, ključne su za zdravlje srca.

items.title: Zašto Ivan Perišić ima okrugle modrice na vratu? Odgovor je jednostavan
items.summary: TIJEKOM utakmice Hrvatske i Portugala mnogima su za oko zapele tamne, okrugle modrice na vratu Ivana Perišića.

items.title: Scientists discover a protein switch that burns fat and blocks new fat cells
items.summary: A protein called “Mitch” may hold the key to a new generation of obesity treatments. Researchers found that disabling it in human cells boosts fat burning, increases energy use, and makes it harder for new fat cells to develop. The findings help explain why mice lacking Mitch were leaner, more athle

items.title: A mayor in Japan announced her maternity leave - and got the whole country talking
items.summary: In the face of criticism, Shoko Kawata, 35, says she loves her job and is proud to be taking time off to have a baby.

items.title: This spray-on powder can stop life-threatening bleeding in 1 second
items.summary: A new spray-on powder developed by KAIST can stop life-threatening bleeding in about one second by instantly forming a strong gel over a wound.
